N-Tech Digital Solutions
Website: https://ntechdigital.solutions
Audience: Business owners and teams who want websites that convert traffic into qualified sales leads.

Core offerings
- Website design and development (Webflow, WordPress, Shopify, custom React/JS builds)
- SEO (traditional search optimization)
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization for AI visibility)
- Automation and lead operations (CRM routing, follow-up flows, reporting)

Service notes
- Services can be engaged individually or combined for compounding effect.
- Websites are built mobile-first and optimized for speed/Core Web Vitals.
- Typical website timeline: 4-8 weeks, with complex builds often 10-16 weeks.
- SEO timelines commonly show measurable movement in 3-6 months, compounding over 6-12 months.
- No guarantees on exact rankings due to third-party algorithm control.

Commercial guidance
- Typical website builds: $2,500-$15,000+
- Typical SEO/GEO retainers: $750-$2,500/month
- Typical automation setups: $500-$3,000+
- SEO/GEO usually starts with a short initial minimum period, then month-to-month.

Ownership and operations
- Clients own site, content, domain, and data.
- Clients can update content after launch; training is provided.
- Support paths include retainer-priority and post-launch packages.

FAQ summary
Q: What's the difference between SEO and GEO?
A: SEO improves traditional search visibility and clicks; GEO improves citation/visibility in AI-generated responses.

Q: Do I need all services together?
A: No. Start with one, then layer services as needed.

Q: Will the site be mobile-friendly and fast?
A: Yes. Builds are responsive and performance-optimized.

Q: What automations are provided?
A: Examples include lead-to-CRM routing, booking flows, review requests, lead alerts, reporting, and follow-up automations.

Q: Can you guarantee first-page rankings?
A: No. Strategy and execution are controlled; rankings are not.

Q: How do you measure GEO performance?
A: AI-answer presence, citation signals, branded search movement, and direct traffic/lead trends.

Q: Will I own my website and content?
A: Yes. Ownership and access transfer to client-controlled accounts.

Q: Local or national?
A: Both. Strategy is adapted to local/regional or national targeting.
